security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://gmail.googleapis.com

bundle.longDescription: Kept is a local-first desktop email client for fast personal mail, private local search, and bring-your-own AI.
